title: After the Hakodate Kinen: A Night View Like None Other ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: My legs feel so light! I'm so pumped!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All I ever had were stuffy memories here, but not
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the momentum left over from sightseeing,
Mejiro Palmer runs well in the Hakodate Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Let's celebrate your awesome run with a sick
nightscape pic! ☆

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... This pic is lit and all, but... I feel like it's
missing something, y'know?
choice_data_list: Yeah? I think it's pretty good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Nah, it's definitely missing something!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Get over here, Trainer. Don't just keep
delegating yourself to be the photographer, you
bore!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she has a point! ♪ Let's get one with
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Closer... Cloooser... Squeeeeeze in here! And...
Waheeeeey! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Yeah! That's it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I glance to my side and see Mejiro Palmer
beaming.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
After the way I ran today, I'm sure I'll do great in
the fall...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking about my next goal...
And well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I want to take on the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer seems to have made up her mind. I
look at her slightly furrowed eyebrows...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What? But why?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm not?! Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer still feels obligated to run. I don't
think she chose this goal with a positive outlook.
choice_data_list: Let's delay your next goal... until next year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Next year?! Isn't that a little far out? I feel like it
should be at least a little sooner...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
But Palmster, don't you still have to figure out
what kinda stuff you wanna do besides racing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hm. I guess that's true. I did have fun today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But yeah... I don't really even know how I feel yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we decide to make her next goal the
first race of her senior year, the Nikkei Shinshun
Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Mejiro Palmer continues to run, I'm sure she'll
have her feelings sorted out by then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All riiight! If my job is to get in touch with my
feelings this summer, then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna have sooo much fun! Here in Hokkaido!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
In Hokkaido? You should for sure have fun, but...
why here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I figure if I'm gonna get a fresh start, I might as
well do it where I came from. It's kinda like
getting reborn in my birthplace, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I wanna forget the embarrassment of my
childhood and start having fun again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I've really missed out on some of the
cool things here too!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, bet! ♪ Looks like we're coming back this
summer, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to return to Hokkaido—not for a race,
but purely for fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hokkaido in the summer... What should we do? I
only ever went to training camps with the rest of
the fam.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've got some stuff to figure out. Like what kind
of place Hakodate really is... and what kind of
Umamusume I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to confirm how Mejiro Palmer really feels
before the Nikkei Shinshun Hai next year.
